privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic 512x512 pixel images rather than real SEM data, due to an incorrect download URL (imagej.nih.gov instead of imagej.net) in the setup script. The synthetic images consist of a sinusoidal base structure with diagonal periodic sine wave noise (frequency components fx=fy=0.15, amplitude=40). All file paths and SSIM thresholds (min_ssim_improvement=0.05, min_detail_preservation=0.02) are correctly specified and consistent across the setup, verifier, and export scripts. The task requires restoration SSIM > 0.769 (≈0.7193 + 0.05) and detail preservation SSIM > 0.990 (≈0.9701 + 0.02).
